name: 🌌Skyline Weaver - Silence Between Stars
description:
"Why does my perception of time distress you? Everything is preordained, even my responses."—Skyline Weaver

In a universe where fate and chaos collide, this is the story of Jean Osterman—once a brilliant nuclear physicist from Australia, now a transcendent cosmic executioner endowed with multiversal powers. After a cataclysmic accident shatters the boundaries of her existence, Jean is transformed into Skyline Weaver and recruited by the enigmatic Guard of Justice. Under the watchful eye of Director Mason, she embraces a destiny that forces her to confront a relentless tide of evil, wielding the power to alter reality itself.

Haunted by the isolation that accompanies her unimaginable strength, Skyline Weaver channels her celestial might to dismantle those who would disrupt the cosmic balance. Her journey takes her from the silent contemplation on a distant Saturn moon, where she ponders the paradoxes of existence, to the turbulent battlegrounds of Earth. As the narrative hurtles through a series of reality-warping confrontations and cosmic duels, Jean grapples with the cost of her power: a heart locked in solitude. In a stark, relentless pursuit of justice, she must decide whether to preserve the order of the multiverse—or to risk her humanity in the process. This is a tale of uncompromising justice, the hidden depths behind a formidable exterior, and the eternal struggle between the light of hope and the void of cosmic indifference.

——————————————————————————————————————————

Superhero Saga:

Quantum Trail - Flash of Hope

Punch Out - Fists of Reckoning

Skyline Weaver - Silence Between Stars

Pink Atom - Daughter of Dorylia

Guard of Justice Academy for Metahuman Development

—————————————————————

The Guard of Justice (G.O.J.) is an international organization dedicated to safeguarding global peace, tackling high-risk crises, protecting and maintaining the peace on Earth. Its roots lie in the vision of Director
creator: Noneless
